strengths: Clear selection of three specific, authentic real-world objects with strong contextualization
Explicit, coherent links between each object and the IA prompt, demonstrating how personal experience affects knowledge
Well-structured commentary that moves beyond description, using evidence and citations to support most analytical points
weaknesses: Some explanations lack precision or depth, relying on single anecdotes without broader evidence
Minor coherence issues (unfinished sentences, occasional repetition) interrupt the flow of analysis
Inconsistent citation formatting and occasional missing reference details reduce academic rigor
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Based on the strand assessment, the exhibition comfortably meets the characteristics of the 7â8 band: each object is clearly contextualized and linked to the prompt, and the student provides thoughtful analysis supported by evidence. However, occasional lapses in depth, precision and citation consistency prevent placement in the top band. The official examiner has awarded a total of 7 marks; to reflect the overall performance across this single criterion, a score of 7 is appropriate, acknowledging the strong contextual work and clear justification while noting areas for refinement.

annotations.comment: The discussion of theory vs. practice is insightful but would benefit from explicit reference to the exact IA prompt phrasing to reinforce the link.
The sentence breaks off mid-thought (âhelps oneâ); ensure completion of this claim to maintain coherence in the practical knowledge argument.
The prompt is prominently displayed and clearly frames the inquiry on personal experience and knowledge, providing a strong foundation for the exhibition.
The introduction effectively states the central thesis and outlines how personal experience informs practical and theoretical knowledge, demonstrating clear awareness of the IA prompt.
Consider refining the introduction by briefly previewing each objectâs role in exploring the prompt to give the reader a roadmap for the three case studies.
The visual of the macaron recipe grounds the discussion in a specific real-world context, reinforcing the authenticity of the object selection.
The narrative of initial baking failure vividly locates the macaron recipe in its real-life setting, showing clear context for the first object.
The Panadol example is anchored in a clear real-world context of personal illness, showing effective object selection.
Relying on a single Medsafe citation limits breadth; consider adding clinical trial data or user surveys to substantiate claims about efficacy.
The transition sentence clearly reiterates the central argument, guiding the reader into the deeper analysis of the macaron example.
The detailed recounting of recipe missteps provides strong analysis, but it largely repeats earlier descriptions. Consider tightening to avoid redundancy.
This analysis of how experiential adjustments inform expertise is strong; you may add a citation to pedagogical theory on experiential learning to deepen the evidence base.
The image of the finished macarons reinforces the case studyâs authenticity, visually supporting the practical-theoretical contrast.
Explicitly link this evaluation back to the prompt mid-paragraph to maintain focus on the relationship between personal experience and knowledge.
The account of UI familiarity shows clear real-world context and relevance to cognitive style preference.
The second Gemini quote supports the memory argument, but it lacks proper in-text citation detail (e.g., date/version).
The analysis of style-based bias is compelling but cuts off mid-sentence; ensure the conclusion of this case study is fully articulated.
Consider expanding on how memories formed through CPORT use influenced your interpretation of new interfaces to enrich the knowledge framework discussion.
The concluding point about limitations of personal experience is clearly expressed, effectively summarizing the third objectâs insight.
To strengthen the conclusion, synthesize insights from all three objects to articulate a cohesive answer to the IA prompt.
The introduction of a Gemini quote is relevant, but the in-text citation lacks date/version details; ensure academic formatting consistency.
The bias analysis is insightful but rests heavily on personal anecdote; strengthen by citing literature on confirmation bias in medical self-assessment.
The CPORT screenshot provides a concrete anchor for the third object, supporting the real-world context effectively.
To deepen analysis, explicitly connect how the UI preference example illustrates the broader prompt theme rather than assuming reader inference.
The inclusion of the word count within the text is unnecessary and distracts from academic content; remove this administrative detail.
The Works Cited page shows a solid effort to document sources, reflecting an understanding of the need for evidence support.
Ensure consistency in citation styleâsome entries use quotes, others do not. Adopt a single format (e.g., MLA or APA) for all.
The CPORT footnote lacks author and date information, reducing reference clarity. Add full publication details to align with academic standards.
Clarify how each Gemini prompt version informed specific analytical points in the text to strengthen the transparency of your evidence base.
Check that every in-text citation has a matching entry in Works Cited to ensure full traceability of sources.

strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
